text: Will someone please tell Donnie to stop treating Truth Social like it’s the Oval Office?
text_zh: 有人能告诉唐尼别再把“真实社交”（Truth Social）当成白宫椭圆形办公室了吗？

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇵🇪 AP: Peru’s election is facing major voting disruptions after authorities failed to deliver ballots and election materials to multiple polling stations on time, delaying the opening of voting centers across the country and abroad. The issues left thousands…" ⚡️ 🇵🇪 Right-wing candidate Rafael López Aliaga alleged fraud in Peru’s presidential election and gave the head of Peru’s electoral court a 24-hour ultimatum to annul the results, warning he would call for a “civil insurgency” if not complied with, saying “we give you 24 hours to declare this garbage null.” @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇵🇪 美联社：秘鲁大选面临重大投票中断，当局未能按时将选票和选举材料送达多个投票站，导致全国及海外投票中心推迟开放。这些问题导致数千名……” ⚡️ 🇵🇪 右翼候选人拉斐尔·洛佩斯·阿里亚加（Rafael López Aliaga）指控秘鲁总统大选存在舞弊，并向秘鲁选举法院院长发出24小时最后通牒，要求其宣布选举结果无效，并警告称如果不遵守，他将呼吁进行“公民暴动”，称“我们给你24小时宣布这堆垃圾无效。” @wfwitness

text: 🇷🇺 🇨🇳 ⚡️ Lavrov: Russia & China Reject Western Hegemony Rooted in Colonialism "Blatant attempts by the West, both the United States and Europe, to maintain and even upgrade its hegemony… including the slave trade, colonialism… continue living… at the expense of others" He warned West Asia and the Persian Gulf is “a crisis knot” that cannot be easily cut.
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇨🇳 ⚡️ 拉夫罗夫：俄罗斯和中国拒绝根植于殖民主义的西方霸权。“西方，包括美国和欧洲，在维持甚至升级其霸权方面的公然企图……包括奴隶贸易、殖民主义……继续以牺牲他人为代价生活……” 他警告称，西亚和波斯湾是一个无法轻易解开的“危机结”。

text: OSINTdefender Iran secretly used a ‌Chinese spy satellite during the recent war that gave its military new capability to target U.S. military bases across the ‌Middle ⁠East, sources tell the ⁠Financial Times. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2044271133571092959/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 消息人士告诉《金融时报》，伊朗在最近的战争中秘密使用了中国间谍卫星，这使其军队获得了瞄准中东各地美军基地的新能力。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2044271133571092959/photo/1 推文

text: The Spectator Index Trump says that NATO 'was not there for us' and won't be in the future. https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2044266327523897826/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 特朗普称北约“没有支持我们”，未来也不会支持我们。https://twitter.com/spectatorindex/status/2044266327523897826/photo/1 推文

text: U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent says China will effectively be cut off from Iranian oil: Those ships aren’t going to be allowed out anymore… they’re not going to be able to get their oil. They can get oil. Not Iranian oil.
text_zh: 美国财政部长斯科特·贝森特（Scott Bessent）表示，中国实际上将被切断伊朗石油供应：那些船只将不再被允许离开……他们将无法获得伊朗石油。他们可以获得石油，但不是伊朗石油。

text: Ukraine’s Military Intelligence(GUR) says it secretly carried out two rocket launches to near-space/space during the war—one above 100 km (crossing into space) and another reaching 204 km. They also tested a rocket launched from an aircraft at ~8,000 m, which they say is Europe’s first air-launch of its kind. This approach could eventually enable an “airborne launch system” for missiles or even small satellites. Source: Defence Blog
text_zh: 乌克兰军事情报局（GUR）称，其在战争期间秘密进行了两次近太空/太空火箭发射——一次超过100公里（进入太空），另一次达到204公里。他们还测试了一种从约8000米高空的飞机上发射的火箭，他们称这是欧洲首次此类空中发射。这种方法最终可能实现导弹甚至小型卫星的“机载发射系统”。来源：Defence Blog

text: 🇷🇺 🇨🇳 ⚡️ “The international situation… is now being aggravated by the actions of our Western colleagues in regions including Ukraine, Latin America and the Strait of Hormuz " — Lavrov
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇨🇳 ⚡️ “国际局势……目前正因我们西方同事在包括乌克兰、拉丁美洲和霍尔木兹海峡在内的地区的行动而加剧。” —— 拉夫罗夫

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇨🇳 Reuters: A Chinese tanker sanctioned by the United States has passed through the Strait of Hormuz despite the U.S. blockade, according to shipping data. The vessel, identified as Rich Starry, is reported to have carried around 250,000 barrels of methanol…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇨🇳 Reuters: The U.S.-sanctioned Chinese tanker Rich Starry returned to the Strait of Hormuz on Wednesday after briefly exiting the Gulf, failing to break the U.S. blockade. It had been one of at least eight ships crossing the waterway on the first day of the blockade. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇨🇳 路透社：据航运数据显示，一艘被美国制裁的中国油轮尽管受到美国封锁，仍通过了霍尔木兹海峡。该船被确认为‘Rich Starry’号，据报道载有约25万桶甲醇……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇨🇳 路透社：被美国制裁的中国油轮‘Rich Starry’号在短暂离开海湾后，于周三返回霍尔木兹海峡，未能突破美国封锁。它是封锁首日穿越该水道的至少八艘船只之一。@wfwitness

text: Iran secretly acquired a Chinese-built spy satellite (TEE-01B) in late 2024 via the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps aerospace unit. Leaked documents suggest the satellite was then used to monitor key U.S. military bases across the Middle East, producing time-stamped imagery and coordinates. These were used before and after drone and missile strikes to help plan attacks and assess damage. Source: FT
text_zh: 伊朗通过伊斯兰革命卫队航空航天部队在2024年底秘密获得了中国制造的间谍卫星（TEE-01B）。泄露的文件显示，该卫星随后被用于监视中东各地的关键美军基地，生成带有时间戳的图像和坐标。这些信息在无人机和导弹袭击前后被用于协助规划攻击和评估损失。来源：FT

text: 🇷🇺 💬 Russia can make up for the energy resource deficit of China and other interested countries, which arose against the backdrop of the blockade of the Strait of Hormuz, Lavrov said during his visit to China. Other statements by the head of the Russian Foreign Ministry: ➡️ Putin's visit to China will take place in the first half of 2026. ➡️ Lavrov reported that he discussed the aggravation of the situation in the world due to the actions of the West, the situation in the Middle East, the militarization of the EU, and the crisis in NATO. ➡️ The US and Iran should promote realistic goals in the negotiations, and Russia and China are ready to promote any formats of their external support. ➡️ Moscow will accept any decision by Iran on enriched uranium and is ready to play a role in resolving this issue. ➡️ Relations between Russia and the US are not at a "freezing point", contacts are being conducted, but not all of them are being reported on. ➡️ At the negotiations on Ukraine in Alaska, the discussion focused on recognizing the de jure realities on the ground, and Moscow remains committed to the agreements reached at the summit. ➡️ US sanctions against Russia remain in place, as does the discrimination of Russian energy companies in the market. ➡️ The West is plotting a new military bloc, in which Ukraine is a leading participant. ➡️ Macron is reveling in the idea of creating "stabilization forces" in Ukraine. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇷🇺 💬 拉夫罗夫在访问中国期间表示，俄罗斯可以弥补中国和其他相关国家因霍尔木兹海峡封锁而产生的能源资源缺口。俄罗斯外交部长的其他声明：➡️ 普京将于2026年上半年访问中国。➡️ 拉夫罗夫报告称，他讨论了因西方行动导致的全球局势恶化、中东局势、欧盟军事化以及北约危机。➡️ 美国和伊朗应在谈判中推动现实目标，俄罗斯和中国准备推动任何形式的外部支持。➡️ 莫斯科将接受伊朗关于浓缩铀的任何决定，并准备在解决这一问题上发挥作用。➡️ 俄美关系并未处于“冰点”，双方保持着联系，但并非所有联系都被报道。➡️ 在阿拉斯加举行的乌克兰问题谈判中，讨论重点是承认实地法律现实，莫斯科仍致力于峰会上达成的协议。➡️ 美国对俄罗斯的制裁依然存在，对俄罗斯能源公司在市场上的歧视也依然存在。➡️ 西方正在策划一个新的军事集团，乌克兰是其中的主要参与者。➡️ 马克龙沉迷于在乌克兰建立“稳定部队”的想法。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇵🇪 Peru voted in its 2026 general election following a turbulent period that saw seven presidents in nine years. A total of 34 candidates are competing in a crowded first round where the top two advance to a June runoff. The main contenders include: Right…" ⚡️ 🇵🇪 AP: Peru’s election is facing major voting disruptions after authorities failed to deliver ballots and election materials to multiple polling stations on time, delaying the opening of voting centers across the country and abroad. The issues left thousands of voters unable to cast ballots as scheduled, forcing officials to extend voting into an additional day in affected areas. Election observers said the problems were logistical in nature, with an EU mission stating there was no sufficient evidence to support claims of fraud, despite criticism from some candidates, namely López Aliaga. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇵🇪 秘鲁在经历了九年七任总统的动荡时期后，举行了2026年大选。共有34名候选人在拥挤的第一轮投票中竞争，前两名进入6月的决选。主要竞争者包括：右翼……” ⚡️ 🇵🇪 美联社：秘鲁大选面临重大投票中断，当局未能按时将选票和选举材料送达多个投票站，导致全国及海外投票中心推迟开放。这些问题导致数千名选民无法按计划投票，迫使官员在受影响地区将投票时间延长至额外的一天。选举观察员表示，这些问题属于后勤性质，欧盟代表团表示，尽管受到一些候选人（即洛佩斯·阿里亚加）的批评，但没有足够的证据支持舞弊指控。@wfwitness

text: 🇷🇺 🇨🇳 ⚡️ Lavrov holds talks with Xi Jinping during Beijing visit Lavrov and Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi discussed the US-Iran conflict, the situation in the Asia-Pacific, and the Ukraine crisis.
text_zh: 🇷🇺 🇨🇳 ⚡️ 拉夫罗夫在北京访问期间与习近平举行会谈。拉夫罗夫与中国外交部长王毅讨论了美伊冲突、亚太局势以及乌克兰危机。

text: 🇺🇸 Trump posts a message for NATO and for the Pope 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 特朗普发布了给北约和教皇的消息 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ Trump and his Anti-NATO Meltdown -- AGAIN
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 特朗普和他的反北约崩溃——再次发生

text: OSINTdefender Since its founding, the only time that NATO has ever invoked Article 5 has been in the defense of the United States after 9/11, leading to the death of several hundred NATO-led coalition troops during the War in Afghanistan. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2044263762421596523/photo/1 U.S. President Donald J. Trump continues his complaining about NATO in a late night post on TruthSocial, stating: “NATO wasn’t there for us, and they won’t be there for us in the future! President DONALD J. TRUMP” https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2044261385282920941/photo/1 - OSINTdefender tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 自成立以来，北约唯一一次援引第五条款是在9/11事件后为了保卫美国，这导致了阿富汗战争期间数百名北约领导的联军士兵死亡。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2044263762421596523/photo/1 美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普在“真实社交”深夜发帖继续抱怨北约，称：“北约没有支持我们，未来也不会支持我们！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统” https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2044261385282920941/photo/1 - OSINTdefender 推文

text: OSINTdefender U.S. President Donald J. Trump continues his complaining about NATO in a late night post on TruthSocial, stating: “NATO wasn’t there for us, and they won’t be there for us in the future! President DONALD J. TRUMP” https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2044261385282920941/photo/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel U.S. President Donald Trump to ABC News: "If I weren’t president, the world would be torn to pieces." U.S. President Donald Trump said that he isn't thinking about extending the ceasefire, adding that he doesn't think it will be necessary. "I think you’re going to be watching an amazing two days ahead. I really do," he told ABC News' Jonathan Karl. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044258194659197383/photo/1 - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普对美国广播公司（ABC News）表示：“如果我不是总统，世界就会分崩离析。” 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，他没有考虑延长停火协议，并补充说他认为没有必要。“我认为你将在未来两天看到令人惊叹的事情。我真的这么认为，”他告诉ABC新闻的乔纳森·卡尔（Jonathan Karl）。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044258194659197383/photo/1 - Open Source Intel 推文

text: OSINTtechnical Trump complains about NATO in a late night post: “NATO wasn’t there for us” https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2044260823896346719/photo/1 tweet

text: The Spectator Index IMF projection for economic growth in 2026. 🇻🇳 Vietnam: 7.1% 🇮🇳 India: 6.5% 🇮🇩 Indonesia: 5.0% 🇲🇾 Malaysia: 4.7% 🇧🇩 Bangladesh: 4.7% 🇨🇳 China: 4.4% 🇵🇭 Philippines: 4.1% 🇵🇰 Pakistan: 3.6% 🇺🇸 United States: 2.3% 🇦🇺 Australia: 2.0% 🇰🇷 South Korea: 1.9% 🇹🇭 Thailand: 1.5% 🇨🇦 Canada: 1.5% 🇯🇵 Japan: 0.7% tweet
text_zh: The Spectator Index 国际货币基金组织（IMF）对2026年经济增长的预测。🇻🇳 越南：7.1% 🇮🇳 印度：6.5% 🇮🇩 印度尼西亚：5.0% 🇲🇾 马来西亚：4.7% 🇧🇩 孟加拉国：4.7% 🇨🇳 中国：4.4% 🇵🇭 菲律宾：4.1% 🇵🇰 巴基斯坦：3.6% 🇺🇸 美国：2.3% 🇦🇺 澳大利亚：2.0% 🇰🇷 韩国：1.9% 🇹🇭 泰国：1.5% 🇨🇦 加拿大：1.5% 🇯🇵 日本：0.7% 推文

text: OSINTdefender The U.S. Navy has intercepted a total of eight crude oil tankers attempting to enter or leave Iranian ports since the start of the blockade on Monday, in all cases, American forces contacted the crew by radio communications and instructed them to reverse course, with all of the tankers having complied thus no boarding was deemed necessary, U.S. officials tell the Wall Street Journal. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 美国官员告诉《华尔街日报》，自周一封锁开始以来，美国海军已拦截了总共八艘试图进入或离开伊朗港口的石油油轮，在所有情况下，美军都通过无线电通讯联系了船员并指示他们掉头，所有油轮均已遵守，因此无需登船。推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. President Donald Trump: "NATO wasn’t there for us, and they won’t be there for us in the future!" https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044260133409083404/photo/1 tweet

text: Open Source Intel U.S. President Donald Trump: "Will someone please tell Pope Leo that Iran has killed at least 42,000 innocent, completely unarmed, protesters in the last two months, and that for Iran to have a Nuclear Bomb is absolutely unacceptable. Thank you for your attention to this matter. AMERICA IS BACK!!! President DONALD J. TRUMP." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普：“有人能告诉教皇利奥，伊朗在过去两个月里杀害了至少42,000名无辜、完全手无寸铁的抗议者，而且伊朗拥有核弹是绝对不可接受的吗？感谢您对此事的关注。美国回来了！！！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统。” 推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. President Donald Trump said that he isn't thinking about extending the ceasefire, adding that he doesn't think it will be necessary. "I think you’re going to be watching an amazing two days ahead. I really do," he told ABC News' Jonathan Karl. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044258194659197383/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，他没有考虑延长停火协议，并补充说他认为没有必要。“我认为你将在未来两天看到令人惊叹的事情。我真的这么认为，”他告诉ABC新闻的乔纳森·卡尔。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044258194659197383/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender During an interview today with ABC News, U.S. President Donald J. Trump stated that he doesn’t believe there will be a need to extend the current ceasefire with Iran, telling Jonathan Karl that a peace deal is coming, “I think you’re going to be watching an amazing two days ahead. I really do.” tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 在今天接受ABC新闻采访时，美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普表示，他不认为有必要延长目前与伊朗的停火协议，并告诉乔纳森·卡尔和平协议即将到来，“我认为你将在未来两天看到令人惊叹的事情。我真的这么认为。” 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇵🇪 Peru voted in its 2026 general election following a turbulent period that saw seven presidents in nine years. A total of 34 candidates are competing in a crowded first round where the top two advance to a June runoff. The main contenders include: Right-wing Keiko Fujimori of Popular Force Far-right Rafael López Aliaga of Renovación Popular Left-wing Roberto Sánchez of Juntos por el Perú Centrist Jorge Nieto of Partido del Buen Gobierno Populist Ricardo Belmont. With votes 82% counted, Fujimori currently leads with about 17%, followed by a tight cluster of López Aliaga, Sánchez, Nieto, and Belmont each around 10–12%, leaving the second runoff spot still undecided as more votes are counted. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇵🇪 秘鲁在经历了九年七任总统的动荡时期后，举行了2026年大选。共有34名候选人在拥挤的第一轮投票中竞争，前两名进入6月的决选。主要竞争者包括：右翼“人民力量党”的藤森惠子（Keiko Fujimori），极右翼“人民革新党”的拉斐尔·洛佩斯·阿里亚加（Rafael López Aliaga），左翼“为了秘鲁”的罗伯托·桑切斯（Roberto Sánchez），中间派“美好政府党”的豪尔赫·涅托（Jorge Nieto），民粹主义者里卡多·贝尔蒙特（Ricardo Belmont）。在已统计82%选票的情况下，藤森惠子目前以约17%的得票率领先，紧随其后的是洛佩斯·阿里亚加、桑切斯、涅托和贝尔蒙特，每人约10-12%，随着更多选票的统计，第二个决选席位仍未确定。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 U.S. President Trump on NATO: NATO wasn’t there for us, and they won’t be there for us in the future! President DONALD J. TRUMP @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇺🇸 美国总统特朗普谈北约：北约没有支持我们，未来也不会支持我们！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇦 🇮🇷 U.S. President Trump on Pope Leo: Will someone please tell Pope Leo that Iran has killed at least 42,000 innocent, completely unarmed, protesters in the last two months, and that for Iran to have a Nuclear Bomb is absolutely unacceptable. Thank you for your attention to this matter. AMERICA IS BACK!!! President DONALD J. TRUMP @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇦 🇮🇷 美国总统特朗普谈教皇利奥：有人能告诉教皇利奥，伊朗在过去两个月里杀害了至少42,000名无辜、完全手无寸铁的抗议者，而且伊朗拥有核弹是绝对不可接受的吗？感谢您对此事的关注。美国回来了！！！唐纳德·J·特朗普总统 @wfwitness

text: 🇵🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Another Brutal Israeli Occupation Strike: Civilians Targeted in Al-Shati Refugee Camp, Gaza At least five Palestinians were killed and several others wounded after an Israeli strike hit a civilian area in Al-Shati Refugee Camp, west of Gaza City.
text_zh: 🇵🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 又一次残酷的以色列占领军袭击：加沙沙蒂难民营的平民成为目标。在以色列袭击加沙城西部沙蒂难民营的一个平民区后，至少五名巴勒斯坦人死亡，多人受伤。

text: 🐻 All the key news of the past 24 hours - just because we like you ➡️ Russian Rostec has tested the technology of group use of strike drones. ➡️ Slovenia’s new parliamentary speaker says he wants a referendum on leaving NATO. ➡️ Indonesia has agreed on oil and gas supplies from Russia ➡️ Zelensky promised to restore the operation of the "Druzhba" oil pipeline in two weeks ➡️ Rubio held talks with representatives of Israel and Lebanon at the US State Department but the Lebanese Amal Movement has rejected any form of direct negotiation with Israel ➡️ Italian PM slams Trump after attack on Pope Leo, and Trump responds ➡️ FCC Chairman Brendan Carr, when asked if he's trying to chill criticism of the administration tells companies to switch over to cable or streaming or YouTube if they don't like it ➡️ Saudi FM Prince Faisal bin Farhan tries to push back on US pressure to pick sides ➡️ Vladimir Putin will visit China soon ➡️ Trump says the war with Iran is not over 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🐻 过去24小时的所有关键新闻——只因为我们喜欢你 ➡️ 俄罗斯国家技术集团（Rostec）测试了打击无人机群组使用技术。➡️ 斯洛文尼亚新任议长表示，他希望就退出北约举行公投。➡️ 印度尼西亚已就从俄罗斯供应石油和天然气达成一致。➡️ 泽连斯基承诺在两周内恢复“友谊”输油管道的运营。➡️ 卢比奥在美国国务院与以色列和黎巴嫩代表举行了会谈，但黎巴嫩阿迈勒运动拒绝与以色列进行任何形式的直接谈判。➡️ 意大利总理在特朗普攻击教皇利奥后抨击特朗普，特朗普对此作出回应。➡️ 美国联邦通信委员会（FCC）主席布伦丹·卡尔（Brendan Carr）在被问及是否试图压制对政府的批评时，告诉公司如果不喜欢，就换成有线电视、流媒体或YouTube。➡️ 沙特外交大臣费萨尔·本·法汉亲王试图抵制美国要求选边站的压力。➡️ 弗拉基米尔·普京即将访问中国。➡️ 特朗普称与伊朗的战争尚未结束。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: OSINTdefender RT @sentdefender : Newly released video footage from the splashdown of NASA’s Artemis ll in the Eastern Pacific on Friday, April 10, 2026, shows the moment that U.S. Navy Divers cracked the door open and entered the Orion to greet the Astronauts, welcoming them back to Earth after their journey around the Moon. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 转发 @sentdefender：2026年4月10日星期五，美国国家航空航天局（NASA）的“阿耳忒弥斯2号”（Artemis ll）在东太平洋溅落的最新视频片段显示，美国海军潜水员打开舱门进入“猎户座”飞船迎接宇航员的那一刻，欢迎他们结束绕月之旅回到地球。推文

text: WarMonitor A former Trump WH press secretary says Americans can’t be expected to make even more economic sacrifices when they’re not convinced there ever was a real “imminent” threat or clearly told why Trump started the war on Iran to begin with. https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044254223651528777/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarMonitor 一位前特朗普白宫新闻秘书表示，当美国人并不相信曾经存在真正的“迫在眉睫”的威胁，也没有被明确告知特朗普为何发动对伊战争时，不能指望他们做出更多的经济牺牲。https://twitter.com/TheWarMonitor/status/2044254223651528777/video/1 推文

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 ABC: President Donald Trump said in a phone interview he is not considering extending the ceasefire, adding he believes it may not be necessary and that “an amazing two days” are ahead. Trump said the war could end either through a deal or after military objectives are achieved, while adding that he believes “the radicals are gone” and claiming the world would be “torn to pieces” without his leadership. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国广播公司（ABC）：唐纳德·特朗普总统在电话采访中表示，他没有考虑延长停火协议，并补充说他认为没有必要，未来“令人惊叹的两天”即将到来。特朗普表示，战争可以通过协议结束，也可以在军事目标实现后结束，同时补充说他相信“激进分子已经消失”，并声称没有他的领导，世界将会“分崩离析”。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 CNN: Sattelite images capture the burned out wreckage of two U.S. MC-130J that were attacked during rhe operation to rescue the down F-15 crew members to blow up the aircraft. The wreckage is on a remote air strip. south of the city of Isfahan. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国有线电视新闻网（CNN）：卫星图像捕捉到了两架美国MC-130J飞机的烧毁残骸，这些飞机在营救被击落的F-15机组人员的行动中遭到袭击，随后被炸毁。残骸位于伊斯法罕市南部的一个偏远简易机场。@wfwitness

text: 🇵🇸 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 An elderly Zionist spotted an activist riding by with a Palestine shirt and flag. He started talking trash. Then he fell. The trash talk stopped immediately. The pavement is antisemitic...
text_zh: 🇵🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 一名年长的犹太复国主义者看到一名骑车经过的活动人士穿着巴勒斯坦衬衫并带着旗帜。他开始说垃圾话。然后他摔倒了。垃圾话立刻停止了。人行道是反犹太主义的……

text: Open Source Intel ATF New Orleans said it responded to a fire at a Tesla sales office early this morning where a suspected Molotov cocktail was used to ignite a blaze at the front door. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044247512165265882/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美国烟酒枪炮及爆炸物管理局（ATF）新奥尔良分局表示，今天清晨对特斯拉销售办公室的一起火灾做出了响应，怀疑有人使用莫洛托夫鸡尾酒在前门纵火。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2044247512165265882/photo/1 推文

text: OSINTdefender Florida Governor Ron DeSantis signed a bill Tuesday to rename State Road 80, a nearly 125-mile stretch of coast-to-coast state highway which runs from Lee County to Palm Beach County in Southern Florida, as President Donald J. Trump Highway, set to take effect July 1, 2026. https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2044246571353530643/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 佛罗里达州州长罗恩·德桑蒂斯（Ron DeSantis）周二签署了一项法案，将80号州道（一条从佛罗里达州南部李县延伸至棕榈滩县、全长近125英里的海岸到海岸州际公路）更名为“唐纳德·J·特朗普总统公路”，定于2026年7月1日生效。https://twitter.com/sentdefender/status/2044246571353530643/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel CENTCOM commander Adm. Brad Cooper: "A blockade of Iranian ports has been fully implemented as U.S. forces maintain maritime superiority in the Middle East. An estimated 90% of Iran’s economy is fueled by international trade by sea. In less than 36 hours since the blockade was implemented, U.S. forces have completely halted economic trade going into and out of Iran by sea." tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 中央司令部司令布拉德·库珀（Adm. Brad Cooper）海军上将：“伊朗港口的封锁已全面实施，美军在整个中东地区保持海上优势。据估计，伊朗90%的经济由国际海上贸易推动。自封锁实施不到36小时以来，美军已完全切断了伊朗的海上进出口贸易。” 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "BREAKING! THE WAR ON IRAN IS OVER (according to Trump) "I said to him, Mr President, you keep talking about the war like, was was, was? I said, is it over? He said, it's over, over." — Maria Bartiromo after a visit to the White House 🔴 @DDGeopolitics |…" 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 No, the war is not over, just close to being over 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇹 🇮🇱 Italian Prime Minister Meloni annouced that Italy has suspended the automatic renewal of their defence agreement with Israel earlier this Tuesday. @wfwitness

text: 🇯🇵 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 Japanese TV on live TV: "This Kushner guy, what authority does he have? What exactly his position? Is he there simply as a representative of the Trump family? He is Jewish, right?"
text_zh: 🇯🇵 🇮🇷 ⚡️ 🇺🇸 日本电视直播： “这个库什纳（Kushner）家伙，他有什么权力？他到底是什么职位？他只是作为特朗普家族的代表在那里吗？他是犹太人，对吧？”

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 U.S. CENTCOM commander Adm. Brad Cooper: A blockade of Iranian ports has been fully implemented as U.S. forces maintain maritime superiority in the Middle East. An estimated 90% of Iran's economy is fueled by international trade by sea. In less than 36 hours since the blockade was implemented, U.S. forces have completely halted economic trade going into and out of Iran by sea. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 美国中央司令部司令布拉德·库珀海军上将：伊朗港口的封锁已全面实施，美军在整个中东地区保持海上优势。据估计，伊朗90%的经济由国际海上贸易推动。自封锁实施不到36小时以来，美军已完全切断了伊朗的海上进出口贸易。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Trump in his interview with Maria Bartiromo, Fox News: “I think it’s close to over. Yeah. I view it as very close to over. You know what? If I pulled up stakes right now, it would take them 20 years to rebuild that country.”
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 特朗普在接受福克斯新闻玛丽亚·巴蒂罗莫采访时表示：“我认为它接近结束了。是的。我认为它非常接近结束。你知道吗？如果我现在撤出，他们需要20年才能重建那个国家。”

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 WSJ: U.S. naval forces have intercepted eight oil tankers entering or leaving Iranian ports since the start of the blockade on Monday. Officials say U.S. forces contacted the crews by radio and ordered them to turn back, with all vessels complying and no boardings taking place. The first two interceptions reportedly involved ships departing Iran’s Chabahar port and were directed by a U.S. destroyer, with P-8 maritime patrol aircraft also involved. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 《华尔街日报》：自周一封锁开始以来，美国海军已拦截了八艘进入或离开伊朗港口的石油油轮。官员们表示，美军通过无线电联系了船员并命令他们掉头，所有船只均已遵守，没有发生登船事件。据报道，前两次拦截涉及离开伊朗恰巴哈尔港的船只，并由一艘美国驱逐舰指挥，P-8海上巡逻机也参与其中。@wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 🇰🇼 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 New Sentinel-2L satellite images show heavy damage to the United States military base at Camp Buehring, Kuwait. 🔹 Two helicopter shelters, a large maintenance structure (LAMS), and one warehouse were completely destroyed in the Iranian strikes.
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇰🇼 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 新的Sentinel-2L卫星图像显示，位于科威特的美国军事基地布埃林营地（Camp Buehring）遭到严重破坏。🔹 两座直升机掩体、一座大型维护结构（LAMS）和一个仓库在伊朗的袭击中被完全摧毁。

text: 🇵🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 The Islamic Charitable Society in Hebron, which supports more than 6,000 orphans across 2,000 families, was shut down by Israeli forces, which arrested its president, Sheikh Hatem Al-Bakri, along with staff
text_zh: 🇵🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 位于希伯伦的伊斯兰慈善协会支持着2000个家庭中的6000多名孤儿，该协会被以色列军队关闭，其主席谢赫·哈特姆·巴克里（Sheikh Hatem Al-Bakri）及工作人员被捕。
